practice.name: Problem 8 (2019 AIME I)
practice.statement: This is a 2019 AIME I problem focusing on trigonometry and the Law of Cosines. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2019_AIME_I_Problems/Problem_8).

practice.name: Problem 3 (2014 AIME II)
practice.statement: This is a 2014 AIME II problem focusing on trigonometric identities. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2014_AIME_II_Problems/Problem_3).
